name: GOLFTEC Park Cities
about:
GOLFTEC Park Cities serves as a comprehensive indoor golf improvement center located in the Park Cities area. The facility utilizes advanced teaching technologies, including OPTIMOTION motion measurement and high-speed video analysis, to provide data-driven golf instruction. It functions primarily as a coaching and club fitting studio, offering personalized lesson plans and equipment optimization services.

The venue features private training bays equipped with simulator technology, allowing golfers to practice on virtual recreations of famous courses like Pebble Beach and Quail Hollow. In addition to instruction, the center provides practice memberships for those wishing to utilize the launch monitors and video feedback tools independently. The environment is designed to be professional and focused on skill development, catering to golfers of all levels looking to lower their scores through a proven game improvement system.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced OPTIMOTION swing tracking and video analysis
PGA Award-winning coaches providing personalized instruction
Custom club fitting to optimize distance and accuracy
Access to virtual courses on high-definition simulators
Proven improvement plans with measurable data
Practice memberships for independent training sessions

food_and_drink.notes: No bar or alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Features high-speed cameras and OPTIMOTION motion capture technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While bringing your own clubs is recommended for the best fitting experience, clubs are typically available for use during lessons or evaluations if you do not have your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: As a professional training facility, outside food and drinks are generally not permitted, though water is usually available. The focus is on instruction rather than dining.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On a simulator, playing 18 holes typically takes about 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the software mode and the pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers coaching programs specifically designed for juniors, utilizing technology that helps young golfers understand and improve their game.
